hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: Please read these terms carefully before booking our photography services.

booking.title: Booking Required
booking.description: All sessions require advance booking and deposit

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.description: Deposit due at booking, balance before delivery

copyright.title: Image Rights
copyright.description: Photographer retains copyright, clients receive usage rights

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By booking our photography services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: Services Overview
services.intro: Studio of Light offers professional photography services including:
services.note: Each service package includes specific deliverables as outlined in your contract. Additional services may be available upon request.

booking.title: Booking and Reservation
booking.item1: Contact us to check availability for your preferred date
booking.item2: Sign a service agreement outlining the specific services and deliverables
booking.item3: Pay the required deposit (typically 30-50% of total cost)
booking.item4: Your date is secured only upon receipt of signed agreement and deposit

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.intro: Our payment policy is as follows:
payment.item1: Deposit: Required at booking to secure your date
payment.item2: Balance: Due before final image delivery (typically 50-70% of total)
payment.item3: Accepted methods: Credit card, bank transfer, cash
payment.item4: Late payments may delay delivery and incur additional fees
payment.note: Prices are subject to change. Your contract price is locked upon deposit payment.

byClient.title: Cancellation by Client
byClient.item1: More than 90 days before event: 50% deposit refund
byClient.item3: Less than 30 days before event: No refund (deposit forfeited)

byPhotographer.title: Cancellation by Photographer
byPhotographer.description: In the unlikely event we must cancel, we will provide a full refund and assist in finding a replacement photographer if possible. Our liability is limited to amounts paid to us.

copyright.title: Copyright and Usage Rights
copyright.intro: Copyright ownership and usage rights are structured as follows:

photographer.title: Photographer Rights
photographer.item1: Photographer retains full copyright ownership of all images
photographer.item2: We may use images for portfolio, marketing, and promotional purposes
photographer.item3: We may submit images to publications and photography contests

client.title: Client Usage Rights
client.item1: You receive a personal, non-exclusive license to use delivered images
client.item2: Permitted uses: personal social media, prints, personal websites
client.item3: Prohibited uses: commercial use, resale, or redistribution without permission

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: Please note the following liability limitations:
liability.item1: Equipment failure: We use backup equipment, but cannot guarantee against all failures
liability.item2: Missed moments: While we strive for perfection, we cannot guarantee capture of every moment
liability.item3: Weather/unforeseen events: We are not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control
liability.insurance: We maintain professional liability insurance. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount paid for our services.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to our website.
changes.notification: For active contracts, we will notify clients of significant changes. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

cta.title: Ready to Book Your Session?
cta.description: Contact us to discuss your photography needs and get started.
